  "summary": "This is a scanned page from an HVAC manual, primarily containing contact information for two companies: TICA (Nanjing) Air-Conditioning Co., Ltd. and TICA (Tianjin) Air-Conditioning Co., Ltd. The page includes addresses, phone numbers, fax numbers, email addresses, and websites. There is also a note at the bottom regarding product specifications and changes.",

  ],

  "ocr_text_if_useful": "南京天加空调设备有限公司\nTICA (NANJING) AIR-CONDITIONING CO., LTD.\n地址：中国江苏南京经济技术开发区恒业路6号\n电话：86-25-85326977 传真：86-25-85323095\nhttp://www.ticachina.com E-mail: tica@ticachina.com\n邮编：210046\n\n天津天加空调设备有限公司\nTICA (TIANJIN) AIR-CONDITIONING CO., LTD.\n地址：中国天津市北辰区华苑产业区祥苑路12号\n电话：022-83712735 传真：022-83712731\nhttp://www.ticachina.com E-mail: jp@ticachina.com\n邮编：300384\n\n注：由于天加公司产品会不断改良和创新，因此本资料所载产品型号、规格和参数如有变动，恕不另行通知，敬请注意和谅解。版号：10-05",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page is mostly blank with text concentrated in the lower right corner. The handwritten annotation is faint and may be a document or part number. The watermark is overlaid at the bottom.",

parsed.summary: This is a scanned page from an HVAC manual, primarily containing contact information for two companies: TICA (Nanjing) Air-Conditioning Co., Ltd. and TICA (Tianjin) Air-Conditioning Co., Ltd. The page includes addresses, phone numbers, fax numbers, email addresses, and websites. There is also a note at the bottom regarding product specifications and changes.
